site_locations.name: Monastery
site_locations.enemy_token: Violet (random, only if burned; units cannot be used in that combat)
interactions: Burn it: Reputation -3, triggers violet enemy combat (no units allowed), grants Artifact if enemy defeated

site_locations.name: Keep
site_locations.combat_notes: Assault costs Reputation -1; defenders are fortified
interactions: Own it: gain unit recruitment + extra card draw
rewards: Ownership bonus: unit recruitment, extra card draw

site_locations.name: Mage Tower
site_locations.combat_notes: Assault costs Reputation -1; defenders are fortified
interactions: On conquest: recruit units, buy Spells for 7 Influence, gain mana of tower's color

site_locations.name: Dungeon
site_locations.combat_notes: Night rules apply inside; units cannot be used in combat
interactions: Night rules apply; no units in combat
Can be re-entered after conquest for Fame only
rewards: Roll mana die: gold or black = Spell; any other color = Artifact

site_locations.name: Tomb
site_locations.combat_notes: Night rules apply inside; units cannot be used in combat
interactions: Night rules apply; no units in combat

site_locations.name: Ruins
site_locations.combat_notes: Either pay mana to altar (no combat) or fight enemies. Tokens persist after conquest.
interactions: Option A: Pay 3 mana of shown color to altar — no combat, gain 7 Fame
Option B: Fight enemies on yellow token — gain reward shown on token
Tokens remain face-up after resolution (can be revisited by other players)
rewards: Enemy path: reward shown on yellow token

site_locations.name: Monster Den
rewards: 2 random mana crystals: roll mana die twice; gold result = choose any color crystal; black result = +1 Fame instead

site_locations.name: Spawning Ground
site_locations.combat_notes: Must fight 2 brown tokens; partial defeat leaves remaining tokens; defeated tokens are replaced face-down

site_locations.name: Crystal Mine
interactions: End your turn on the mine hex to gain 1 mana crystal of the mine's color
rewards: 1 mana crystal of mine's color (per visit)

site_locations.name: Magical Glade
interactions: End your turn here: throw away 1 Wound
Start your turn here during Day: gain a gold mana token
Start your turn here during Night: gain a black mana token

site_locations.name: City
site_locations.combat_notes: Assault costs Reputation -1; city defenders are fortified and have bonus abilities; city color determines defender types
interactions: On conquest: recruit city-icon units, buy items from city offer
Leader of conquering group gets +2 cards when adjacent to conquered city

interactions.note: The Portal wiki page exists but contains no description text. Check the rulebook for Portal interactions.

rewards.note: Portal reward details not found on wiki.

not_found_on_wiki: Portal site description and interactions (page is blank)
Ruin (singular) — the /wiki/Ruin URL redirects to Yellow Tokens, not a site description
